AI_GATEWAY_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Your Cloudflare **Account ID**. Find it at [dash.cloudflare.com](https://dash.cloudflare.com) → any zone → Overview → right sidebar.

AI_GATEWAY_ID.description: Your **AI Gateway** name. Create one at [dash.cloudflare.com](https://dash.cloudflare.com) → AI → AI Gateway.

AI_GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Auth token for AI Gateway. Generate one at AI Gateway → Settings → API Auth Token.
